request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that expanding domestic security powers has already prevented 3 major attacks in the last 2 years? While some worry about civil liberties, the truth is that these measures are carefully balanced to protect us all. Our neighbors in Europe have seen similar success with their security frameworks. It's time we prioritize safety over fear of overreach. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurCommunities
